recipes.name: simple-task
recipes.description: Bare-minimum task: one Dockerfile, an instruction, a pytest test, and a reference solution.

recipes.name: multi-container
recipes.description: Docker Compose task with an additional service the agent interacts with over the Docker network.

recipes.name: mcp-tools
recipes.description: Giving agents access to custom MCP tools via a FastMCP server running in a companion container.

recipes.name: simulated-user
recipes.description: An MCP server that acts as a simulated user the agent must talk to and discover requirements from.

recipes.name: computer-use-ubuntu
recipes.description: Computer-use task on an Ubuntu (XFCE4) virtual desktop requiring genuine GUI interaction.

recipes.name: dns-blacklisting
recipes.description: Pattern-based hostname blacklisting via a local HTTP gateway with exact, wildcard, and regex rules.

recipes.name: multi-reward
recipes.description: Multiple verifiers writing independent rewards to reward.json.

recipes.name: computer-use-windows
recipes.description: Computer-use task on a Windows virtual desktop requiring genuine GUI interaction via CUA agents.
